hero.subtitle: SavvyOwl automatically optimises your prompts and routes each task to the most efficient model. Text only. Real savings.

optimize.subtitle: See how SavvyOwl transforms a messy prompt into a precise instruction.
optimize.prompt_before: Hi, I'd like you to write for me a marketing copy-style text for me to post on my Instagram talking about how my followers can use artificial intelligence to create content for their social media in a more efficient and cheaper way, with a motivational and inspiring tone if possible
optimize.prompt_after: Instagram copy: how to use AI to create social media content — efficient, affordable. Tone: motivational. Format: post. Audience: content creators.

howItWorks.step1_desc: Type what you need in natural language. No special formatting required.
howItWorks.step2_desc: The engine analyses your prompt, removes redundancies, improves context and reformulates for maximum efficiency.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Your optimised prompt is automatically routed to Gemini Flash or Gemini Pro — whichever fits the task best.

why.card1_desc: Every prompt is analysed and compressed before sending. You pay for what matters, not for filler words.
why.card2_desc: Simple tasks go to Gemini Flash (fast, cheap). Complex tasks go to Gemini Pro (precise, powerful). No manual selection.
why.card3_desc: See exactly what you spend per prompt, per day, per month. Set budgets. No surprises.

models.subtitle: SavvyOwl automatically selects the best model for each task.
models.flash_desc: Fast and affordable. Ideal for simple tasks: summaries, classifications, quick copy, translations.
models.pro_desc: Precise and powerful. Best for complex reasoning, long-form content, strategy, and nuanced writing.

features.f1_desc: Before sending, SavvyOwl analyses your prompt, removes redundancies, improves context and reformulates for maximum effectiveness. Save tokens and money without losing quality.
features.f2_desc: Each prompt is classified by task type, complexity and language — and automatically routed to the best-performing model between Gemini Flash and Gemini Pro.
features.f3_desc: Real-time dashboard. Cost per prompt, per model, per day. See how much you saved. Set limits. No surprises.
features.f4_desc: Save what works. Organise by category. Reuse with one click. Your knowledge compounds.

auth.startSmart: Start using AI the smart way
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account!

dashboard.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Start your first chat!

chat.startConversationDesc: Choose a mode and type your message. SavvyOwl will route it to the best AI automatically.
chat.contentCreatorBanner: ContentCreator AI — optimized for captions, scripts, and copy
chat.upgradeMode: Upgrade to Starter or Pro to use this mode.
